where.if: AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sub_title_pc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR sub_title_mo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.sql: a.id ,a.title ,a.sub_title_pc ,a.sub_title_mo ,a.icon_image ,a.descript1 ,a.descript2 ,a.descript3 ,a.descript4 ,a.descript5 ,a.use_yn ,a.order_no ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm ,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_pmb_recomplan_planlist WHERE mng_id = a.id) planLisCnt , b.lowPrice AS lowestPrice
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_recomplan_mng a , ( SELECT a.mng_id, MIN(b.sale_price) lowPrice from tb_pmb_recomplan_planlist a, tb_pmb_plan_list b WHERE a.plan_id= b.id GROUP BY a.mng_id ) b WHERE a.id = b.mng_id AND a.use_yn = 1 ORDER BY a.order_no , a.id desc

SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_recomplan_mng a , ( SELECT a.mng_id, MIN(b.sale_price) lowPrice from tb_pmb_recomplan_planlist a, tb_pmb_plan_list b WHERE a.plan_id= b.id GROUP BY a.mng_id ) b WHERE a.id = b.mng_id AND a.use_yn = 1

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_recomplan_mng a , ( SELECT a.mng_id, MIN(b.sale_price) lowPrice from tb_pmb_recomplan_planlist a, tb_pmb_plan_list b WHERE a.plan_id= b.id GROUP BY a.mng_id ) b WHERE a.id = b.mng_id AND a.use_yn = 1 AND a.id=#{id}
